abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Ragged Hope
abilities.text: After this model suffers damage from an action or trigger, enemy models within (melee)1" gain an Abandoned token.

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

actions.name: Playful Frenzy
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has an Abandoned token, increase this action's Dmg by +1.

triggers.name: Rampage
triggers.text: Move this model 5", ignoring enemy models. Models moved through this way must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: The Lonely Call
actions.effects: Target is moved up to 5" toward this model. If the target has an Abandoned token, increase the distance moved by up to +2".

triggers.name: Misunderstood Monster
triggers.text: Target must either discard a card or gain an Abandoned token.

actions.name: Fly With Me
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may target a friendly model within 2".
actions.effects: Place this model within range. If this action received a raise, place the target (if any) in base contact with this model.

actions.name: Tap the Leyline
actions.effects: Draw two cards and then discard one card.
